scripts.format:src: prettier --write src scripts vite.config.ts eslint.config.js svelte.config.js index.html
scripts.format:check:src: prettier --check src scripts vite.config.ts eslint.config.js svelte.config.js index.html
scripts.download:speech-models: node scripts/download-speech-asr-model.mjs && node scripts/download-speech-whisper-model.mjs && node scripts/download-speech-tts-model.mjs
scripts.build:sidecar: node scripts/ensure-sherpa-onnx-libs.mjs && node scripts/copy-sidecar.mjs --ensure-dummy && node scripts/copy-speech-sidecar.mjs --ensure-dummy && cd src-tauri && cargo build --release --bin agodesk-worker --features computer-use-sidecar && cd .. && node scripts/run-with-speech-env.mjs cargo build --release --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --bin agodesk-speech --features speech-sidecar && node scripts/copy-sidecar.mjs && node scripts/copy-speech-sidecar.mjs
scripts.build:speech-sidecar: node scripts/ensure-sherpa-onnx-libs.mjs && node scripts/copy-speech-sidecar.mjs --ensure-dummy && node scripts/run-with-speech-env.mjs cargo build --release --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --bin agodesk-speech --features speech-sidecar && node scripts/copy-speech-sidecar.mjs
scripts.build:win: npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/stage-sherpa-runtime.mjs && npm run tauri -- build --bundles nsis --features computer-use-sidecar,speech-sidecar
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/build-linux-bundles.mjs
scripts.icons:generate: npm run tauri -- icon src-tauri/icons/app-icon.svg -o src-tauri/icons
